mapper.sql: select id, site_id, master_article_id, relation_type, is_visible, is_top, is_recommend, custom_title, sort_order, view_count, remark, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time from gb_site_master_article_relations
mapper.select: select r.id, r.site_id, r.master_article_id, r.is_visible, r.is_top, r.is_recommend, r.custom_title, r.sort_order, r.view_count, a.title as article_title, a.slug as article_slug, a.cover_url as article_cover_image, m.status as article_status from gb_site_master_article_relations r inner join gb_master_articles m on r.master_article_id = m.id and m.del_flag = '0' inner join gb_articles a on m.id = a.master_article_id and a.locale = m.default_locale and a.del_flag = '0' where r.site_id = #{siteId} order by r.sort_order, r.id

select r.id, r.site_id, r.master_article_id, r.relation_type, r.is_visible, r.is_top, r.is_recommend, r.custom_title, r.sort_order, r.view_count, w.name as site_name from gb_site_master_article_relations r inner join gb_sites w on r.site_id = w.id where r.master_article_id = #{articleId} order by r.sort_order, r.id
mapper.insert:
insert into gb_site_master_article_relations ( site_id, master_article_id, relation_type, is_visible, is_top, is_recommend, custom_title, sort_order, view_count, remark, create_by, create_time ) values ( #{siteId}, #{articleId},
#{relationType} 'include' , #{isVisible}, #{isTop}, #{isRecommend}, #{customTitle}, #{sortOrder}, #{viewCount}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, #{createTime} )

insert into gb_site_master_article_relations(site_id, master_article_id, relation_type, is_visible, is_top, is_recommend, sort_order, view_count, create_by, create_time) values
(#{item.siteId}, #{item.articleId},
#{item.relationType} 'include' , #{item.isVisible}, #{item.isTop}, #{item.isRecommend}, #{item.sortOrder}, #{item.viewCount}, #{item.createBy}, #{item.createTime})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE relation_type = VALUES(relation_type), is_visible = VALUES(is_visible), update_time = NOW()
mapper.update: update gb_site_master_article_relations set view_count = view_count + 1 where site_id = #{siteId} and master_article_id = #{articleId}
mapper.delete:
delete from gb_site_master_article_relations where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select count(*) from gb_site_master_article_relations where site_id = #{siteId} and master_article_id = #{articleId} and relation_type = 'exclude'
mapper.delete: delete from gb_site_master_article_relations where site_id = #{siteId} and master_article_id = #{articleId} and relation_type = 'exclude'
mapper.insert:
insert into gb_site_master_article_relations(site_id, master_article_id, relation_type, create_by, create_time) values
(#{siteId}, #{articleId}, 'exclude', #{createBy}, now())
